creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Sun, Jul 08, 2001 at 08:10:50PM -0700, steve howe wrote:

> window command fails to interpret escape codes. (color, et al).
> >How-To-Repeat:
> run window, and list a colorized directory.

Seems to works for me on this terminal.  You're running a very old
version of FreeBSD; perhaps you should update.

Kris
